# programs.discord

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `programs.discord`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `programs.discord.configName` | `string` | Name of the subdirectory where {file}`settings.json` is linked under. For example discord-canary uses `discordcanary`. |
| `programs.discord.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Discord, the chat platform. |
| `programs.discord.package` | `null or package` | The discord package to use. |
| `programs.discord.settings` | `open submodule of (JSON value)` | Configuration for Discord. The schema does not seem to be documented anywhere |
| `programs.discord.settings.DANGEROUS_ENABLE_DEVTOOLS_ONLY_ENABLE_IF_YOU_KNOW_WHAT_YOURE_DOING` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Chrome's devtools inside Discord |
| `programs.discord.settings.SKIP_HOST_UPDATE` | `boolean` | Whether to skip Discord's automatic update checks at startup |
